languages.text: {n}Здоровый глаз Дунавски округляется, а из второй глазницы протягивается прозрачная струйка.{/n} "Это против Устава, Ваша Светлость! Там сказано: "Не замышляй против командира своего!" Ваши слова — испытание, которое я пройду с честью, отвергнув их".

{n}Dunawski's remaining eye widens, while a thin, translucent fluid trickles from the other, ruined socket.{/n} "That is against the Handbook, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It states, 'One must never conspire against a commanding officer!' Your words are a trial I will pass with honour, by rejecting them."
languages.original_text: {n}Здоровый глаз Дунавски округляется, а из второй глазницы протягивается прозрачная струйка.{/n} "Это против Устава, Ваша Светлость! Там сказано: "Не замышляй против командира своего!" Ваши слова — испытание, которое я пройду с честью, отвергнув их".

traits.locale_text: {n}Dunawski's remaining eye widens, and a thin, translucent trickle oozes from the empty socket.{/n} "That is against the Codex, Your Lordship! It states: 'Thou shalt not conspire against thy commander!' Your words are a trial I shall pass with honour, by rejecting them."

{n}Dunawski's remaining eye widens, and a thin, translucent trickle oozes from the empty socket.{/n} "That is against the Codex, Your Lordship! It states: 'Thou shalt not conspire against thy commander!' Your words are a trial I shall pass with honour, by rejecting them."

{n}Dunawski's remaining eye widens, while a thin, translucent fluid trickles from the empty socket.{/n} "That is against the Code, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It states, 'One must never conspire against a commanding officer!' Your words are a trial I shall pass with honour, by rejecting them."

{n}Dunawski's remaining eye widens, while a thin, translucent fluid trickles from the empty socket.{/n} "That is against the Code, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It states, 'One must never conspire against a commanding officer!' Your words are a trial I shall pass with honour, by rejecting them."

{n}Dunawski's remaining eye widens, while a thin, translucent fluid trickles from the other, ruined socket.{/n} "That is against the Handbook, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It states, 'One must never conspire against a commanding officer!' Your words are a trial I will pass with honour, by rejecting them."

languages.text: {n}杜纳芙斯卡仅剩的那只眼睛猛地睁大，而她那只损坏的眼窝中则滑落着一股透明的稀薄液体。{/n}“这有违《手册》，大人！《手册》上写着，‘绝不可对指挥官图谋不轨！’您的话乃是一道考验，而我会拒绝这个提议，以此光荣地通过这场考验！”
languages.original_text: {n}Dunawski's remaining eye widens, while a thin, translucent fluid trickles from the other, ruined socket.{/n} "That is against the Handbook, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It states, 'One must never conspire against a commanding officer!' Your words are a trial I will pass with honour, by rejecting them."

traits.locale_text: {n}杜纳芙斯卡仅剩的那只眼睛猛地睁大，而她那只损坏的眼窝中则滑落着一股透明的稀薄液体。{/n}“这有违《手册》，大人！《手册》上写着，‘绝不可对指挥官图谋不轨！’您的话乃是一道考验，而我会拒绝这个提议，以此光荣地通过这场考验！”

languages.text: {n}Dunawski'nin kalan gözü irileşiyor ve mahvolmuş öteki göz çukurundan ince, yarı saydam bir sıvı süzülüyor.{/n} "Bu Yasa'ya aykırıdır {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri! El Kitabı, 'Komutanına karşı asla komplo kurmamalısın!' der. Sözleriniz reddederek onurla geçeceğim bir sınav."
languages.original_text: {n}Dunawski's remaining eye widens, while a thin, translucent fluid trickles from the other, ruined socket.{/n} "That is against the Handbook, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It states, 'One must never conspire against a commanding officer!' Your words are a trial I will pass with honour, by rejecting them."

traits.locale_text: {n}Dunawski'nin kalan gözü irileşiyor ve mahvolmuş öteki göz çukurundan ince, yarı saydam bir sıvı süzülüyor.{/n} "Bu Yasa'ya aykırıdır {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri! El Kitabı, 'Komutanına karşı asla komplo kurmamalısın!' der. Sözleriniz reddederek onurla geçeceğim bir sınav."

languages.text: {n}L'œil valide de Dunawski s'écarquille, tandis qu'un liquide translucide dégouline de son orbite difforme.{/n} « Ce serait une infraction au Manuel, Votre Seigneurie ! Il stipule que "l'on ne doit jamais conspirer contre un commandant" ! Votre proposition est une épreuve que je réussirai avec honneur en la refusant. »
languages.original_text: {n}Dunawski's remaining eye widens, while a thin, translucent fluid trickles from the other, ruined socket.{/n} "That is against the Handbook, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It states, 'One must never conspire against a commanding officer!' Your words are a trial I will pass with honour, by rejecting them."

traits.locale_text: {n}L'œil valide de Dunawski s'écarquille, tandis qu'un liquide translucide dégouline de son orbite difforme.{/n} « Ce serait une infraction au Manuel, Votre Seigneurie ! Il stipule que "l'on ne doit jamais conspirer contre un commandant" ! Votre proposition est une épreuve que je réussirai avec honneur en la refusant. »

languages.text: {n}El ojo que le queda a Dunawski se abre de par en par y un fluido claro y translúcido brota de la otra cuenca, maltrecha.{/n} «¡Eso sería ir contra el manual, mi{mf|lord|lady}! Dice claramente "¡Nunca se debe conspirar contra un oficial superior!". Sus palabras son una prueba que superaré con honor al rechazarlas».
languages.original_text: {n}Dunawski's remaining eye widens, while a thin, translucent fluid trickles from the other, ruined socket.{/n} "That is against the Handbook, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It states, 'One must never conspire against a commanding officer!' Your words are a trial I will pass with honour, by rejecting them."

traits.locale_text: {n}El ojo que le queda a Dunawski se abre de par en par y un fluido claro y translúcido brota de la otra cuenca, maltrecha.{/n} «¡Eso sería ir contra el manual, mi{mf|lord|lady}! Dice claramente "¡Nunca se debe conspirar contra un oficial superior!". Sus palabras son una prueba que superaré con honor al rechazarlas».

languages.text: {n}Dunawskis verbliebenes Auge weitet sich, während aus ihrer anderen Augenhöhle eine durchsichtige Flüssigkeit sickert.{/n} "Das verstößt gegen das Handbuch, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! Letzteres besagt, 'Konspiriere niemals gegen einen vorgesetzten Offizier!' Eure Worte sind eine Prüfung, die ich ehrenhaft bestehen werde, indem ich sie zurückweise."
languages.original_text: {n}Dunawski's remaining eye widens, while a thin, translucent fluid trickles from the other, ruined socket.{/n} "That is against the Handbook, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It states, 'One must never conspire against a commanding officer!' Your words are a trial I will pass with honour, by rejecting them."

traits.locale_text: {n}Dunawskis verbliebenes Auge weitet sich, während aus ihrer anderen Augenhöhle eine durchsichtige Flüssigkeit sickert.{/n} "Das verstößt gegen das Handbuch, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! Letzteres besagt, 'Konspiriere niemals gegen einen vorgesetzten Offizier!' Eure Worte sind eine Prüfung, die ich ehrenhaft bestehen werde, indem ich sie zurückweise."

languages.text: {n}ダナウスキの残された目は大きく開き、空いた眼窩からは薄い半透明の液体が流れ落ちる。{/n}「それは手引きに反します、御{mf|殿|女}様！『指揮官に対しては決して陰謀を企むことは許されない』と記されています。御言葉は、それを拒否することで名誉を保ちつつ乗り越える試練です。」
languages.original_text: {n}Dunawski's remaining eye widens, while a thin, translucent fluid trickles from the other, ruined socket.{/n} "That is against the Handbook, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It states, 'One must never conspire against a commanding officer!' Your words are a trial I will pass with honour, by rejecting them."

traits.locale_text: {n}ダナウスキの残された目は大きく開き、空いた眼窩からは薄い半透明の液体が流れ落ちる。{/n}「それは手引きに反します、御{mf|殿|女}様！『指揮官に対しては決して陰謀を企むことは許されない』と記されています。御言葉は、それを拒否することで名誉を保ちつつ乗り越える試練です。」
